items.headline: Iran International reports IRGC intelligence threatened Assembly of Experts families to secure Mojtaba Khamenei election
items.summary: IRGC Intelligence Organization allegedly pressured Assembly of Experts members and threatened their families to ensure announcement of Mojtaba Khamenei as third Supreme Leader. Sources indicate IRGC forced several dissenting members into supporting the succession through these threats.

dimension_signal.rationale: IRGC intelligence apparatus using threats against families to secure power demonstrates heightened survival mode tactics

items.headline: New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei issues first message calling for continued military resistance via Strait of Hormuz pressure
items.summary: Iran's new Supreme Leader issued first message attributed to him calling for continued military resistance and maintaining Strait of Hormuz as pressure tool. Message was read by state TV anchor with still photograph displayed, no video or audio of Khamenei himself released.

dimension_signal.rationale: First message delivered only in writing through proxy suggests calculated rather than impulsive communication style

items.headline: Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir threatens nuclear retaliation against India, warns of shattered immunity
items.summary: General Asim Munir warned Pakistan would respond beyond expectations if fresh hostilities triggered, stating Pakistan's expanding military capabilities could dismantle India's misconceived immunity. He cautioned there is no space for war in nuclearised environment.

dimension_signal.rationale: Public nuclear threats and inflammatory rhetoric demonstrate increasingly reckless decision-making patterns

items.headline: ICC rejects Israel's jurisdictional challenges, maintains Netanyahu and Gallant arrest warrants
items.summary: International Criminal Court Pre-Trial Chamber rejected Israel's challenges to jurisdiction and maintained arrest warrants for Benjamin Netanyahu and former Defense Minister Yoav Gallant. Court found reasonable grounds for war crimes charges including restricting humanitarian aid.

dimension_signal.rationale: International court maintaining arrest warrants despite Israeli challenges increases accountability pressure

items.headline: Coalition advances bill to repeal fraud and breach of trust charges Netanyahu faces
items.summary: Israeli coalition lawmakers announced advancement of bill to repeal fraud and breach of trust crime that Prime Minister Netanyahu faces in all three corruption cases. Opposition denounced measure as coup-like attempt to free PM from accountability.

dimension_signal.rationale: Advancing legislation to retroactively eliminate criminal charges demonstrates escalating efforts to avoid accountability

items.headline: Trump impeachment odds hit record high amid Iran war threats, approval rating at 42.9%
items.summary: Impeachment and removal odds for President Trump reached 27% on prediction markets amid his threats against Iran including Tuesday night Strait of Hormuz deadline. Presidential approval rating declined to 42.9% with 54.4% disapproval.

dimension_signal.rationale: Posting threats about whole civilization dying and setting ultimatums demonstrates escalating impulsive behavior

items.headline: House Democrat announces impeachment push against Pete Hegseth over Iran war conduct
items.summary: Representative Yassamin Ansari announced impeachment push against Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth over Iran war conduct. She also called for Trump's cabinet officials to remove him as president through 25th Amendment.

items.headline: China secretly expanding nuclear weapons infrastructure amid US-Israeli Iran operations
items.summary: CNN investigation reveals China conducting most significant nuclear weapon modernization campaign in decades, with satellite imagery showing expansion of production facilities. Expert warns US actions in Iran will frighten China into building more nuclear weapons.

dimension_signal.rationale: Accelerating nuclear weapons expansion in response to US-Israeli operations demonstrates heightened security concerns

items.headline: Pentagon report shows China nuclear arsenal growing to 600+ warheads while targeting 2027 Taiwan capabilities
items.summary: Latest Pentagon report assesses China continues progress toward Xi Jinping's 2027 military goal and Taiwan warfighting capabilities despite leadership purges. Nuclear arsenal expanded from low 200s to low 600s through 2024, on track for 1000+ by 2030.

dimension_signal.rationale: Continued military buildup and nuclear expansion despite internal purges shows commitment to long-term strategic goals

items.headline: China and Pakistan jointly release five-point peace plan for Iran War
items.summary: PRC and Pakistan announced joint peace plan following meeting between Pakistan's Ishaq Dar and Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi. Plan calls for immediate cessation of hostilities and peace talks while PRC opposes US-Israel attacks on Iranian nuclear facilities.

dimension_signal.rationale: Proposing peace plan while opposing nuclear facility attacks demonstrates value-based diplomatic positioning

items.headline: Moscow court sentences ICC leadership to 15 years prison for Putin arrest warrant
items.summary: Moscow City Court sentenced eight ICC judges and prosecutor to prison terms up to 15 years for issuing arrest warrant against Vladimir Putin. Officials found guilty of bringing knowingly innocent person to criminal liability and preparing attack on foreign state representative.

dimension_signal.rationale: Sentencing international court officials demonstrates extreme rejection of external accountability mechanisms
